comments.text:
Discovered 2026-06-24 during /orchestrate-epic mutagen-33b. `mix spec.check` is red on main (b31354f, the SpecLedEx-migration commit) on two subjects, blocking spec.check as a clean gate:

1. mutagen.ast.v1 — verification command `grep -rn 'defp alias_to_module\|defp find_module_body' lib/mutagen_ex/` matches nothing (functions renamed/removed; the spec's verification command is stale).
2. mutagen.cli.v1 — `mix test test/integration/archive_install_test.exs --include archive_integration` fails: archive-installed `mix mutagen` aborts with runtime_load_failed (`telemetry.app` no such file) — archive packaging missing the telemetry dep, or a real archive-bootstrap bug.

AGENTS.md (lines 49-55) declares spec.check a non-optional local gate, so main is currently violating its own stated gate. mutagen-33b was delta-gated around these (compile + mix test + own-subject verification + no NEW spec.check findings) to avoid blocking unrelated correctness work.

ADDITIONAL pre-existing baseline item found 2026-06-24 during the mutagen-33b capstone (mutagen-33b.6) full e2e run (--include e2e_slow):
- test/mutagen_ex/golden/end_to_end_scenario_5_baseline_red.json is STALE vs the baseline-red details map threaded through in mutagen-wrd.39.2. Actual details now carry "message":"baseline: N test failure(s) before any mutation" + nested "warnings":{"count":0}; the committed golden lacks them. Producing code lib/mutagen_ex/baseline.ex:238 (long-standing). Regenerate via `REGEN=1 mix test test/mutagen_ex/end_to_end_test.exs --only e2e_slow`. Orthogonal to the parallel-path correctness work; NOT epic-attributable (neither CF1 c8e5318 nor CF2a 4d343cf touches the golden/baseline.ex/to_wire/emit_abort path).

INVESTIGATED 2026-06-24 on main @ 756c289 — both originally-tracked items VERIFIED RESOLVED:
- mutagen.ast: dcf06ba rewrote the verification target to `! grep -rq 'defp alias_to_module\|defp find_module_body' lib/mutagen_ex/` (passes on ABSENCE). grep returns no match → command exits 0. GREEN.
- mutagen.cli: `mix test test/integration/archive_install_test.exs --include archive_integration` now passes (1 test, 0 failures); archive builds and `mix mutagen` runs from the installed .ez (telemetry dropped as a runtime dep + hex packaging hygiene). GREEN.
Also: main 22a48cf disabled overlap/duplicate_covers for the facet-decomposed corpus, and mix spec.validate is errors=0. Closing this ticket — titled scope (ast/cli) is done. The scenario-5 baseline-red golden-drift addendum is spun out to its own ticket below.

title: mix spec.check red on main: mutagen.ast stale grep + mutagen.cli archive telemetry
